meta_title: Free Online Image Cropper | Crop Photos & Pictures Securely
meta_description: Crop images online instantly. Use custom aspect ratios or presets for Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook. 100% private, browser-based cropping with no quality loss.
subtitle: Frame your photos perfectly. Crop out distractions, adjust aspect ratios, and format for social media instantly—all processed securely within your browser.

tool_workspace.description: Drag and drop your image below. Use the handles to define your crop box or select a preset ratio.

social_presets.description: Don't guess the dimensions. Use our one-click presets to perfectly frame your content for any platform.

how_to.title: How to Crop an Image Online
how_to.step1_text: Select a JPG, PNG, or WebP file. The image loads instantly in your browser without uploading to a remote server.
how_to.step2_text: Select a fixed aspect ratio or drag the corner handles to create a custom crop frame.
how_to.step3_text: Pan your image within the crop box to center your main subject and eliminate background distractions.
how_to.step4_text: Click 'Crop Image' to process the file locally and download your perfectly framed photo.

faq.q1: Will my cropped image lose quality?
faq.a1: No. Our tool performs a high-fidelity crop, retaining the original resolution and color profile of the selected area.
faq.q2: Are my images uploaded to your servers?
faq.a2: Absolutely not. This tool utilizes modern HTML5 Canvas technology to perform all cropping locally on your device's browser.
faq.q3: Can I crop an image into a circle?
faq.a3: Yes! Select the 'Circular Crop' option in the toolbar, which is perfect for generating profile pictures or avatars with transparent PNG backgrounds.
